CommunityApplications.Profile:
Khord is a self-hosted music sharing app. Share a song once — everyone on your instance can listen on whichever streaming service they use (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Deezer, and more).
Features include cross-platform song sharing, mixtapes (collaborative playlists), playlist import from Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, and YouTube Music, upvoting, an admin panel for managing users and access control, and multiple UI themes. All data stored in a single SQLite database — no external services required.
For support, open an issue at https://github.com/khordapp/khord/issues
